caption: The video shows three men walking through a well-lit indoor corridor with a modern design, featuring spherical hanging lights that reflect their surroundings. The man on the left is wearing a light blue polo shirt and black pants, while the man in the middle is dressed similarly but has his hands clasped together in front of him. The man on the right, also in a light blue polo shirt and black pants, walks slightly ahead of the other two. They appear to be engaged in a conversation as they move forward. The setting suggests a professional or formal environment, possibly an office or a corporate building. The timestamp in the bottom left corner indicates it is 14:05.
